title: KODO Autoevolve Hypothesis
description: Structured Phase A implementation plan consumed by kodo-autoevolve.sh before invoking the builder chain.

trial_id.description: Stable autoevolve trial identifier, formatted by kodo-autoevolve.sh before the plan is implemented.

hypothesis_source.description: The deterministic miner or Claude fallback that produced this plan.

rationale.description: Plain-prose explanation of why this specific change should improve KODO capability.

target_files.description: Repository-relative files the builder is allowed to modify for this trial.

items.description: A single repository-relative file path within the autoevolve mutable surface whitelist.

target_functions.description: Function names the builder is allowed to modify; each must carry a nearby # autoevolve:mutable marker.

items.description: A shell function name marked with # autoevolve:mutable in one of the target files.

expected_factor_delta.description: Predicted directional change for each multiplicative capability factor.

f_automation.description: Expected change to the automation factor.

f_quality.description: Expected change to the quality factor.

f_autonomy.description: Expected change to the autonomy factor.

f_cost.description: Expected change to the cost-efficiency factor.

f_speed.description: Expected change to the speed factor.

predicted_capability_delta.description: Predicted absolute change in capability_score from the proposed implementation.

diff_description.description: Concise description of the intended diff, including whether it removes or adds code.

rollback_plan.description: Exact rollback method if the trial regresses, usually git revert of the resulting PR.

risk_level.description: Estimated blast radius of the proposed change.
